title: Kureha Hides Her Farewell
description: On pages 14–17, this part focuses on kureha hides her farewell, showing the key character choices and conflict behind this chapter beat.
scene: Kureha Hides Her Farewell. Kureha hides her feelings behind cruelty, pushing Chopper toward the sea and the life Hiriluk wanted for him. The scene description focuses on what the reader needs to understand before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Shouldn't be going around touching a pirate's flag!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'll bestow a royal rank on you! And a medal of honour!

dialogue.speaker: Dr. Kureha
dialogue.text: Look! At the top of the tower!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: It's been beaten by a pirate's flag...
